overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit urban residential district with makeshift structures, crossing a street where a large military truck passes, and approaching a house with a crashed aircraft on the roof surrounded by police tape and officers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to orange and white construction barriers, passing makeshift stalls

orange and white striped concrete barriers lining the right side of the path
makeshift structure made of corrugated metal sheets and tarps
tall palm trees lining the street in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by construction barriers on the right and makeshift stalls on the left, with a large ferris wheel structure visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with residential buildings and commercial signage

events.description: exiting the narrow enclosed path into a more open street area with wider visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment opens up to a wider street view with more buildings visible

entered.detail: large tent with green canvas covering a market stall or makeshift dwelling
tall red digital billboard with white graphics mounted on a building
two-story yellow wooden house with a distinctive roof structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character approaches an intersection, passing a prominent green tent structure on the left and revealing more of the residential street lined with palm trees and a large red billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crossing with vehicle traffic

events.description: large military truck drives past from left to right, temporarily blocking the view of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while waiting for a large military truck to pass, then continuing to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: large black military truck driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: blue painted two-story house with wooden siding visible across the street
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street intersection as a large military truck passes by, moving from the enclosed path to the open road and approaching a residential area with distinctive architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with police incident scene and crashed vehicle on roof

events.description: approaching a house with a crashed aircraft on the roof, cordoned off with yellow police tape and officers standing guard

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing the police scene at the house with the crashed vehicle on the roof, passing by officers and onlookers

notable_agents.action: police officer in uniform standing guard near the yellow caution tape

entered.detail: yellow house with a large crashed aircraft or vehicle embedded in the roof, emitting smoke
yellow police caution tape strung along the front of the property

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distinctive house with a crashed AV on the roof, surrounded by police tape and officers, with pedestrians walking by and observing the incident scene in this residential neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cluttered urban residential district that transitions from a narrow walkway into an open street scene centered around a crash site. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by construction barriers and makeshift stalls, with a distant ferris wheel visible against a clear blue sky. As the character approaches an intersection, the environment opens up to reveal a green tent, palm trees, and a large red billboard. The scene then shifts to the open road as the character crosses the intersection while a large military truck passes by, moving toward a residential area with distinctive architecture. Finally, the camera arrives at a house with a crashed AV on the roof, where police tape and officers secure the scene amidst a crowd of observing pedestrians.
